task: Write a generic min function that works on any type implementing the Ord trait
Write a Summable trait with a sum method and implement it for Vec<i32> and Vec<f64>
Write a generic Cache<K, V> struct with get, insert, and evict_oldest, using trait bounds for key hashing

tests.input: v c = Cache.new(2); c.insert("a", 1); c.insert("b", 2); c.insert("c", 3); c.get("a")

task: Write a generic Iterator trait and implement it for a Range struct that yields consecutive integers
Write a generic Builder pattern with chained method calls that constructs a Config struct
